Record Class KofiTransaction

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
dev.chojo.aether.kofi.pojo.KofiTransaction
Record Components:
verificationToken - The verification token to validate the request.
messageId - The unique message ID.
timestamp - The timestamp of the transaction.
type - The type of the transaction (e.g., Subscription, Donation).
isPublic - Whether the transaction is public.
fromName - The name of the sender.
message - The message attached to the transaction.
amount - The amount of the transaction.
url - The URL of the transaction.
email - The email of the sender.
currency - The currency of the transaction.
isSubscriptionPayment - Whether it is a subscription payment.
isFirstSubscriptionPayment - Whether it is the first payment of a subscription.
kofiTransactionId - The Ko-fi transaction ID.
shopItems - List of items purchased if it's a shop order.
shipping - Shipping information.
tierName - The name of the subscription tier, if applicable.
discordUsername - The Discord username of the sender, if provided.
discordUserId - The Discord user ID of the sender, if provided.
public record KofiTransaction(String verificationToken, String messageId, Instant timestamp, Type type, boolean isPublic, String fromName, String message, String amount, String url, String email, String currency, boolean isSubscriptionPayment, boolean isFirstSubscriptionPayment, String kofiTransactionId, List<KofiShopItem> shopItems, Object shipping, String tierName, String discordUsername, String discordUserId) extends Record
Represents a transaction received from a Ko-fi webhook.

  • Constructor Details

    • KofiTransaction

      public KofiTransaction(String verificationToken, String messageId, Instant timestamp, Type type, boolean isPublic, String fromName, String message, String amount, String url, String email, String currency, boolean isSubscriptionPayment, boolean isFirstSubscriptionPayment, String kofiTransactionId, List<KofiShopItem> shopItems, Object shipping, String tierName, String discordUsername, String discordUserId)
      Creates an instance of a KofiTransaction record class.
      Parameters:
      verificationToken - the value for the verificationToken record component
      messageId - the value for the messageId record component
      timestamp - the value for the timestamp record component
      type - the value for the type record component
      isPublic - the value for the isPublic record component
      fromName - the value for the fromName record component
      message - the value for the message record component
      amount - the value for the amount record component
      url - the value for the url record component
      email - the value for the email record component
      currency - the value for the currency record component
      isSubscriptionPayment - the value for the isSubscriptionPayment record component
      isFirstSubscriptionPayment - the value for the isFirstSubscriptionPayment record component
      kofiTransactionId - the value for the kofiTransactionId record component
      shopItems - the value for the shopItems record component
      shipping - the value for the shipping record component
      tierName - the value for the tierName record component
      discordUsername - the value for the discordUsername record component
      discordUserId - the value for the discordUserId record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
